w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: This document tests all matching scenarios for putpnginword.py Option B (block-scoped node matching).
Description: Simple command with multiple nodes. Should insert 3 images (1 per node).
Description: Nested commands (system-view + subview) with quit. Should insert 1 image.

pic:cNvPr.name: TUC-TEST01 system-view interface GigabitEthernet0_0_1 display this quit quit.png

w:r.w:t: Case 3: Multiple Blocks Per Cell (Option B)
Description: Two separate command blocks each followed by same nodes. Should insert 6 images (2 blocks x 3 nodes).
Description: Different NEs with devices appearing after specific blocks. device2 matches display device (block 0), device1 matches display clock (block 1).
Description: Command that produces [error] PNG should be skipped. No image should be inserted.
Description: Same node appears after two different commands. Should get 2 images (display device + display clock).
Description: Nested block without quit should still match. Should insert 1 image.

pic:cNvPr.name: TUC-TEST01 system-view interface GigabitEthernet0_0_1 display this quit quit.png

w:r.w:t: Description: Cell with command but no nodes. Should insert 0 images.
Description: Command with no matching PNG. Should insert 0 images.
Description: Three command blocks each followed by 3 nodes. Should insert 9 images (3 blocks x 3 nodes).

pic:cNvPr.name: TUC-TEST01 system-view interface GigabitEthernet0_0_1 display this quit quit.png
TUC-TEST02 system-view interface GigabitEthernet0_0_1 display this quit quit.png
TUC-TEST03 system-view interface GigabitEthernet0_0_1 display this quit quit.png

w:r.w:t: Description: First block has wrong command (no match), second block has valid command. Should insert 3 images for second block only.
Description: CEx01 model supports display device, CEx02 supports display clock. Empty block should merge so all devices try both commands.
want to use an error png
want to use an error png
want to use an error png
